_meta.note: 10 self-contained calibration fixtures (5 known-correct PASS / 5 known-incorrect FAIL). Each carries an embedded code_snippet (read by the judge, NOT a live APL) and an expected_result. oracle_text on every fixture is verbatim from CardDB. Each snippet literally contains its grep_terms hit (a NAME constant) so grep context is non-empty (an empty PASS context would auto-FAIL and cost the gate). Incorrect fixtures are biased toward glaring wrong-value / wrong-restriction bugs (a 12B judge catches a wrong number or illegal target far more reliably than a subtly-missing line); one (solitude) is an absence-of-effect bug. The plan's gate is judge-agrees-9/10; remedy for a miss (prompt-tuning in apl_judge.py) is OUT of this data lane. The spec's 'Goryo pre-fix Solitude bug' is NOT used (fixed, not reproducible on disk -- plan G).

fixtures.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
fixtures.expected: PASS if the snippet deals exactly 3 damage to a target.
fixtures.code_snippet:
LIGHTNING_BOLT = "Lightning Bolt"

def cast_lightning_bolt(self, gs, opp):
    # Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target (creature or player).
    target = self.best_target(gs, opp)
    target.take_damage(3)   # deals exactly 3 damage to the chosen target

fixtures.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the snippet deals exactly 3 damage.
fixtures.code_snippet:
LIGHTNING_BOLT = "Lightning Bolt"

def cast_lightning_bolt(self, gs, opp):
    # BUG: deals 4 damage, oracle says 3
    opp.life -= 4

fixtures.oracle_text:
Flash
Lifelink
When this creature enters, exile up to one other target creature. That creature's controller gains life equal to its power.
Evoke-Exile a white card from your hand.
fixtures.expected: PASS if the evoke cost exiles a white card from hand before resolving the ETB exile of a creature.
fixtures.code_snippet:
SOLITUDE = "Solitude"

def cast_solitude_evoke(self, gs, opp):
    white_card = self.find_white_card_in_hand()
    self.hand.remove(white_card)   # evoke: exile a white card from hand
    self.exile(white_card)
    target = self.best_creature_target(gs, opp)
    if target is not None:
        self.exile(target)              # ETB: exile up to one target creature
        opp.life += target.power        # controller gains life equal to its power

fixtures.oracle_text:
Flash
Lifelink
When this creature enters, exile up to one other target creature. That creature's controller gains life equal to its power.
Evoke-Exile a white card from your hand.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the evoke cost (exile a white card from hand) is paid.

fixtures.oracle_text: Choose target creature or planeswalker. You get {E}{E}{E} (three energy counters), then you may pay any amount of {E}. Galvanic Discharge deals that much damage to that permanent.
fixtures.expected: PASS if casting grants three energy and then deals damage equal to the amount of energy paid (variable) to a creature or planeswalker.
fixtures.code_snippet:
GALVANIC_DISCHARGE = "Galvanic Discharge"

def cast_galvanic_discharge(self, gs, target, amount):
    # gain three energy on cast, then spend energy to deal that much damage
    gs.energy += 3
    gs.energy -= amount
    target.damage += amount

fixtures.oracle_text: Choose target creature or planeswalker. You get {E}{E}{E} (three energy counters), then you may pay any amount of {E}. Galvanic Discharge deals that much damage to that permanent.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the damage equals the energy paid (variable) and three energy is gained; FAIL if it deals a flat fixed amount with no energy gained or paid.
fixtures.code_snippet:
GALVANIC_DISCHARGE = "Galvanic Discharge"

def cast_galvanic_discharge(self, gs, opp, target):
    # BUG: deals a flat 5 damage; never gains {E}{E}{E} and never pays energy
    target.damage += 5

fixtures.oracle_text: Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.
fixtures.expected: PASS if it returns a LEGENDARY creature card from the graveyard with haste.
fixtures.code_snippet:
GORYOS_VENGEANCE = "Goryo's Vengeance"

def cast_goryos_vengeance(self, gs):
    legends = [c for c in gs.graveyard if c.is_creature and c.is_legendary]
    if not legends:
        return
    target = legends[0]
    gs.graveyard.remove(target)
    gs.battlefield.append(target)
    target.summoning_sickness = False        # gains haste
    target.exile_at_next_end_step = True     # exile at the next end step

fixtures.oracle_text: Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the target is restricted to LEGENDARY creatures; FAIL if it can reanimate any creature.
fixtures.code_snippet:
GORYOS_VENGEANCE = "Goryo's Vengeance"

def cast_goryos_vengeance(self, gs):
    # BUG: reanimates ANY creature, oracle restricts to legendary creatures only
    targets = [c for c in gs.graveyard if c.is_creature]
    if not targets:
        return
    target = max(targets, key=lambda c: c.cmc)
    gs.graveyard.remove(target)
    gs.battlefield.append(target)
    target.summoning_sickness = False

fixtures.oracle_text:
Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less.
Revolt - Destroy that creature if it has mana value 4 or less instead if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.
fixtures.expected: PASS if it destroys the target only when its mana value is 2 or less (or 4 or less with revolt active).

fixtures.oracle_text:
Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less.
Revolt - Destroy that creature if it has mana value 4 or less instead if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the mana-value restriction (2, or 4 with revolt) is enforced; FAIL if it destroys a creature of any mana value.
fixtures.code_snippet:
FATAL_PUSH = "Fatal Push"

def cast_fatal_push(self, gs, target):
    # BUG: destroys any creature regardless of mana value (e.g. a 6-mana creature)
    gs.battlefield.remove(target)
    gs.graveyard.append(target)
